title: Cherrestria
description: Retextures Minecraft's cherry trees to look like Terrestria's sakura trees.
body:
# Cherrestria
Adds [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)'s sakura textures to Minecraft's cherry trees.

## Screenshots
Here's a comparison of Cherrestria's textures and Minecraft's :

### Cherrestria
![A screenshot of a cherry grove biome with Cherrestria's textures applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9OCWgAUF/images/714d8249598465128b93d306bccf45cc34c030f5.jpeg)

### Vanilla Minecraft
![A screenshot of a cherry grove biome with vanilla Minecraft textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9OCWgAUF/images/d49e6989b445a3c4dd4a4a255f2a2e2c0da7f568.jpeg)
